message:
style(sdk,testkit): apply rustfmt and simplify test assertions

Run rustfmt across coverage_rules, tracing_contract, and mock_server.
Simplify filter-collect-assert patterns to idiomatic iter().any() in
tracing contract tests. Promote FieldVisitor::new to const fn.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
